name: Long Long Man
original_name: さけるグミVSなが～いさけるグミ
overview: Chi-chan and Tooru-san love Sakeru Gummy, but one day, they see "Long Long Man", a mysterious mustached man tearing off a strip of Long Sakeru Gummy as seductive jazz music plays in the background. Since that day, Chi-chan has been obsessed with Long Long Man and anything of great length.
